pitch.title: The Memory Broker
pitch.core_theme: The intrinsic value of our past and the cost of forgetting trauma.
pitch.logline: In a dystopian future where memories are pawned for cash, a desperate detective investigating a serial killer realizes the missing clues are locked inside a memory he sold years ago.
pitch.synopsis:
Act 1: Detective Elias Thorne pawns his painful memories of his late wife to afford a living. He is assigned a gruesome murder case that mirrors an unsolved crime from his past.

Act 2: As Elias delves deeper, he discovers the killer is targeting memory brokers to erase their own crimes. Elias realizes he once witnessed the killer's face, but sold that memory. He must infiltrate the black market of illicit memories to buy his own mind back.

Act 3: Elias retrieves the memory, experiencing the agonizing grief of his wife's death alongside the killer's identity. He confronts the killer in a mind-bending showdown, sacrificing his peace of mind to bring the culprit to justice.

stage2_outline.title: The Memory Broker
stage2_outline.logline: In a dystopian future where memories are pawned for cash, a desperate detective investigating a serial killer realizes the missing clues are locked inside a memory he sold years ago.

beats.description: Detective Elias Thorne sits in a sterile clinic and pawns a joyful memory of his late wife just to afford his rent. Therefore he is emotionally numb to the world around him.
But a gruesome murder occurs in the city center. Elias is called to the scene where the victim's memory port has been violently extracted.
Elias investigates the crime scene and realizes the killer's signature perfectly matches an unsolved case from the exact year his wife died.

But his memories of that era are gone. He checks the pawn logs and realizes he witnessed the original killer but sold the memory to cope with his grief. Therefore he commits to infiltrating the black market to buy his mind back.

act_2.sequence_number_and_title: Sequence 3: Descent into the Black Market

beats.description: Elias enters the neon-lit underworld of illegal memory trading to track down the specific broker who bought his past.
He interrogates shady dealers but learns that a mysterious figure is hunting down brokers and destroying specific memory drives to cover their tracks.
Elias races against time to locate his original broker before the killer reaches them.
But Elias arrives too late. The broker is dead, and Elias comes face-to-face with the masked killer. A brutal fight ensues, and the killer escapes with Elias's memory drive.
Framed for the broker's murder by the fleeing killer, Elias is now hunted by his own police force. Therefore he must go rogue.
Elias tracks the killer to an abandoned sensory-deprivation facility, dodging traps designed to wipe intruders' minds.
Elias manages to steal back his memory drive, but the killer destroys the filtering tech required to view it safely.
Knowing it could shatter his sanity, Elias chooses to inject the raw, unfiltered memory directly into his brain to get the killer's identity.
Elias is plunged into the agonizing grief of his wife's death, experiencing the trauma at full force. But through the pain, he spots the killer's face in the background of the memory.
The memory reveals the murderer's true identity as his own police captain. Therefore Elias knows exactly where to find his target.
Elias confronts the captain in a mind-bending showdown at the precinct, weaponizing his own restored traumatic memories to overload the captain's neural dampeners.
The captain is defeated and arrested. Elias stands at his wife's grave, finally able to fully mourn her, embracing the pain as a vital part of his humanity.
